class.name: ros2_control_marvin/IKController
class.description: IK controller for Marvin dual-arm: subscribes to end-effector pose targets and uses the Marvin kinematics SDK to solve inverse kinematics.

class.name: ros2_control_marvin/TrackerTeleopController
class.description: Tracker teleop controller: subscribes to 5 HTC Tracker poses (hands, upper arms, torso), uses torso as reference frame and elbow direction for null-space, solves IK for dual-arm.
